text.title: Scope Creep Prevention on Hourly Engagements Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Scope Creep Prevention on Hourly Engagements output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: weekly_budget_hours populated with a typed value
billable_taxonomy populated with a typed value
approval_policy populated with a typed value
weekly_summary_template populated with a typed value
overage_policy populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
